docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FANG, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, NORMAN $2,957.89 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,032.89, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $4,550.60 FOR PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY DAMAGES AND LOSS OF USE, REDUCED BY 35% FOR PLAINTIFF'S COMPARATIVE FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,140.30 FILED BY FANG, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, NORMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-31-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, NORMAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
